value.body:
## Outcome

Harden the local backend into a reusable runtime with strong contracts, reliable data recovery, typed APIs, and performance headroom.

## Scope

- `@cycle/backend` runtime extraction
- API/client contract conformance
- Database projection repair and migrations
- Performance benchmarks and operational diagnostics

## Acceptance criteria

- Desktop is no longer the only composition root for running Cycle locally.
- Data and API boundaries are schema-first and covered by contract tests.
- Common corruption, migration, and performance risks have explicit tooling.

frontmatter.title: Roadmap: Backend, API, and data reliability

value.title: Roadmap: Backend, API, and data reliability
